text.title: QA Test Strategy Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: Feature bulk-role-edit. Risks: r1 filter-ignored (S1), r2 N+1 perf (S2), r3 audit gap (S3). r1→integration+e2e (alice); r2→perf+integration (bob); r3→unit (carol). Out-of-scope: perf>1k rows (F-091). Exit: e2e=5 cases green, integration=2 cases green, perf=p95<500ms on 100 rows, unit=audit branches covered. Strategy committed at 720 words.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
